form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At debut, made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 10 at this track on March 5 over 274m, 1.3 len behind Mw Bcause Im Alive carrying 56kg at $5.60. Second-up ran on from midfield; 2nd of 10 at this track in G1 on March 21 over 274m, 1.0 len behind Big Rotney with 56kg at $27.10. Brings the right form to the table. Top chance.

form.formComment: Lining up for just third start.
